reviews.comment:
Sándwich de milanesa súper tierno , demasiado grande lo mejor es que pidan uno para dos , precios acordé . Baños súper limpios

(Translated by Google)
The breaded cutlet sandwich was incredibly tender, but way too big—it's best to order one to share. Prices were reasonable. The restrooms were spotless.
